title: • Begin Prewriting: Develop your thesis and outline.
content:
• Begin Prewriting: Develop your thesis and outline.

Tuesday: Rough Draft & Development
• Review additional drafting resources (lecture slides, video tutorials).
• Write your Rough Draft for the essay.
• Submit draft by end of day (if required).

Wednesday: Peer Review & Writing Mechanics
• Read “Grammar & Writing Mechanics” handout.
• Submit your draft for Peer Review.
• Provide constructive feedback to at least one peer using the Peer Feedback Template.
• Complete Knowledge Check on grammar/essay structure.

Thursday: Quiz, Final Edits & Reflection
• Complete the Quiz for the week.
• Revise your draft based on peer and self-assessment feedback.
• Write a brief reflection answering:
• What revisions did you make and why?
• What did you learn from your peers’ feedback?
• Save your revised draft for your final portfolio (do not submit final draft until Week 6).
